# Project Configuration

<!-- Auto-generated by /ccfold. Manual edits are preserved on re-fold. -->

## Platform
- **Host:** GitHub
- **CLI:** gh
- **Remote:** git@github.com:Wave-Engineering/kairos.git

## Branching
- **Default branch:** main
- **Merge strategy:** squash

## Status Mechanism
- **Type:** GitHub native (labels + Projects)
- **Agent instruction:** Use `gh issue edit` to assign labels; status transitions via GitHub Projects if configured

## Existing Labels
<!-- Labels in use on this repo — do not conflict -->

**Default GitHub:**
- `bug` — Something isn't working
- `documentation` — Improvements or additions to documentation
- `duplicate` — This issue or pull request already exists
- `enhancement` — New feature or request
- `good first issue` — Good for newcomers
- `help wanted` — Extra attention is needed
- `invalid` — This doesn't seem right
- `question` — Further information is requested
- `wontfix` — This will not be worked on

**Wave labels:**
- `wave-1` through `wave-6`
- `master`

## Toolchain
- **Validation:** `make lint` (ruff check + ruff format --check)
- **Tests:** `make test` (pytest)
- **Build:** none
- **Lint:** ruff (check + format)
- **Format:** `make format` (ruff format)
- **CI gate:** `make ci` (lint + test)

## CI
- **System:** GitHub Actions
- **Config:** `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
